title: Chill of the Ice Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: An Ice Giant freezes a faraway kingdom — only a Fire Dragon can save the day! ❄️

q.en: Who is Mina, and why does she travel all the way to Bracken?
q.zh: 米娜是谁？她为什么大老远跑到布雷肯？

options.en: A Dragon Master from the Far North whose kingdom was frozen; she needs a Fire Dragon to defeat the Ice Giant
options.zh: 来自极北之地的驯龙师，她的王国被冰封，需要火龙来击败冰巨人

options.en: A princess who wants to marry King Roland
A cook looking for the best onions
Griffith's old teacher

explain.en: Mina trains under wizard Hulda in the Far North. The Ice Giant Vasty froze her fortress and everyone inside, and legend says only a Fire Dragon can defeat an Ice Giant — so she needs Rori and Vulcan.
explain.zh: 米娜在极北之地师从巫师赫尔达。冰巨人瓦斯蒂把她的堡垒和里面所有人都冻住了，传说只有火龙能打败冰巨人——所以她需要罗瑞和火神。

q.zh: 瓦斯蒂有着怎样的过去？

options.en: An Ice Giant who was trapped in a tomb of ice long ago and now wants revenge
options.zh: 一名冰巨人，很久以前被封进冰墓，如今想要复仇

options.en: A wizard who turned into ice by accident
options.zh: 一个不小心变成冰的巫师

options.en: A dragon from the Land of Pyramids
King Roland's lost brother

explain.en: Long ago Vasty attacked the kingdom and a king's wizard trapped him in a tomb of ice. Now he has woken up, angry, and wants to take back the land he believes is his.
explain.zh: 很久以前瓦斯蒂进攻王国，被一位国王的巫师封进冰墓。如今他苏醒、满腔怒火，想夺回他认为属于自己的土地。

q.en: What new power does Worm show when they reach the island?
q.zh: 到达岛上时，虫虫展示了什么新能力？

options.en: He shoots green energy beams from his eyes
options.zh: 他从眼睛射出绿色能量光束

options.en: He can breathe fire
He can turn invisible
He can swim like a fish

explain.en: On the island, green beams of light shoot from Worm's eyes and zap Neru, knocking the Thunder Dragon backward. Drake has never seen Worm do this before.
explain.zh: 在岛上，绿色光束从虫虫眼中射出，击中内鲁，把雷龙击退。德雷克从没见过虫虫这样做。

q.en: How do the Dragon Masters safely free the frozen people in the fortress?
q.zh: 驯龙师们是怎样安全解救堡垒里被冻住的人的？

options.en: Kepri's sunlight melts the ice without burning them
options.zh: 凯普里的阳光融化冰，而不会灼伤他们

options.en: Vulcan's fire melts the ice quickly
They chop the ice with axes
Worm digs them out

explain.en: Mina warns that fire could burn the people, just as it burned the door. Kepri aims a beam of sunlight at the ice, which slowly and safely melts it, starting with the wizard Hulda.
explain.zh: 米娜提醒说火会像烧门一样灼伤人。凯普里用阳光束照冰，冰慢慢安全地融化，从巫师赫尔达开始。

q.en: What was controlling Mina's Ice Dragon, Frost?
q.zh: 是什么在控制米娜的冰龙弗罗斯特？

options.en: A blue crystal filled with Vasty's magic, hung around his neck
options.zh: 挂在他脖子上、充满瓦斯蒂魔法的蓝色水晶

options.en: A spell cast by Griffith
A golden whistle
Carlos's Dragon Stone

explain.en: Frost wears a crystal that gleams with an eerie blue light. Mina says it is filled with Vasty's magic, and the giant is using it to control her dragon.
explain.zh: 弗罗斯特戴着一颗泛着诡异蓝光的水晶。米娜说里面充满瓦斯蒂的魔法，巨人用它来控制自己的龙。

q.en: How do the Dragon Masters finally defeat the Ice Giant Vasty?
q.zh: 驯龙师们最终是怎样打败冰巨人瓦斯蒂的？

options.en: Worm freezes Vasty in place, then Vulcan's huge fireball shrinks/melts him; Frost's ice tunnel removes him
options.zh: 虫虫把瓦斯蒂定住，火神的大火球把他缩小融化，弗罗斯特的冰隧道把他送走

options.en: They bury him under snow
They sing him to sleep
King Roland arrests him

explain.en: Drake silently asks Worm to freeze Vasty with green energy. Held still, Vasty is hit by Vulcan's enormous fireball and shrinks to tiny size; Frost then breathes a swirling ice tunnel that sucks the giant away.
explain.zh: 德雷克默默请虫虫用绿色能量定住瓦斯蒂。被定身后，火神发射巨型火球把他缩小；弗罗斯特喷出旋涡冰隧道，把小巨人吸走。

q.en: Why couldn't Frost's ice powers stop Vasty?
q.zh: 为什么弗罗斯特的冰之力制不住瓦斯蒂？

options.en: Ice had no effect on the Ice Giant (ice vs. ice didn't work)
options.zh: 冰对冰巨人不起作用（冰碰冰没用）

options.en: Frost was too small
Frost was afraid of the giant
Frost had no ice left

explain.en: Mina says Frost's ice powers had no effect on the Ice Giant. That is why only a Fire Dragon like Vulcan can defeat Vasty.
explain.zh: 米娜说弗罗斯特的冰之力对冰巨人无效。所以只有像火神这样的火龙才能打败瓦斯蒂。

q.en: What polite lie does Rori tell King Lars, and why?
q.zh: 罗瑞对拉尔斯王说了什么善意的谎言？为什么？

options.en: She says King Roland happily sent them to help, though he did not even know they were there
options.zh: 她说罗兰王很高兴派他们来帮忙，其实国王根本不知道他们在

options.en: She says the Ice Giant was friendly
She says Mina is a princess
She says Vulcan can do magic

explain.en: To keep peace and thank the king nicely, Rori bows and says, 'King Roland is happy to help you.' Drake thinks it is a lie, but a smart one, since Roland knew nothing of the trip.
explain.zh: 为了维持和气、好好答谢国王，罗瑞鞠躬说“罗兰王很高兴帮你”。德雷克觉得这是谎话，但是聪明的谎话，因为罗兰对这趟行程一无所知。

q.en: How does King Roland end up NOT punishing Griffith?
q.zh: 国王罗兰最后为什么没有惩罚格里菲斯？

options.en: A scroll from King Lars praises the Dragon Masters and Griffith, so the king spares him
options.zh: 拉尔斯王的一封羊皮卷称赞了驯龙师和格里菲斯，国王便饶了他

options.en: Griffith hides in the dragon caves
Rori fights the king
The Ice Giant returns

explain.en: Just as Roland is furious about the missing Thunder Dragon, a scroll sealed with King Lars's mark falls from the sky. It praises Griffith and the Dragon Masters, so Roland lets the wizard stay.
explain.zh: 就在罗兰因雷龙失踪而大怒时，一封盖有拉尔斯王印玺的羊皮卷从天而降。它称赞格里菲斯和驯龙师，于是国王让巫师留了下来。

q.en: What makes Rori decide to stay with the Dragon Masters at the end?
q.zh: 是什么让罗瑞最终决定留在驯龙师们身边？

options.en: She didn't like Eko's island (too hot, yucky fish) and her friends asked her to stay
options.zh: 她不喜欢埃科的岛（太热、鱼难吃），而且朋友们都请她留下

options.en: She is made queen
She loses her Dragon Stone
The king orders her to stay

explain.en: After the adventure, Rori says she didn't really like the island — too hot and too many yucky fish — and agrees to stay when her friends say, 'We're not a team without you.'
explain.zh: 冒险结束后，罗瑞说她其实不喜欢那座岛——太热、鱼又难吃——当朋友们说“没有你就不成队伍”时，她答应留下。
